chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 1/8: On the Plane
scene: 飞机降落前，空姐发海关申报表。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 请填海关申报表，没有申报的打否。
turns.en: Please complete the customs form. Mark no if you have nothing to declare.

turns.cn: 带了两瓶红酒，要申报吗？
turns.en: I'm bringing two bottles of wine. Should I declare them?
Yes. Fill in the alcohol section.
Do I need to report five hundred dollars cash?
Only if it's over ten thousand.
Got it. Thank you.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 2/8: Immigration
scene: 你抵达美国，在移民局柜台入境。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 护照和签证请出示。来美国做什么？
turns.en: Passport and visa, please. What's the purpose of your visit?

turns.cn: 旅游，待两周，这是返程机票。
turns.en: Tourism, two weeks. Here's my return ticket.
Where will you stay? How much cash are you carrying?

turns.cn: 住在曼哈顿这家酒店，现金五百美元。
turns.en: This hotel in Manhattan. Five hundred dollars in cash.
Are you carrying any fruit or meat products?
No, I know those aren't allowed.
Welcome to the United States. Please scan your fingerprints.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 3/8: Baggage Claim
scene: 过关后你到行李转盘等托运行李。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 请问这个航班行李在哪个转盘？
turns.en: Excuse me, which carousel for this flight?
Screen says four. Bags just started.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我等到蓝色箱子就行。
turns.en: Thanks. I'm waiting for a blue suitcase.
Was the immigration line long?
Not too bad. About thirty minutes.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 4/8: Customs Declaration
scene: 你填写海关申报单，官员询问物品。（对话链：入境）

turns.en: Anything to declare?

turns.cn: 有，我带了两瓶本国红酒送礼。
turns.en: Yes. I have two bottles of wine from home as gifts.

turns.cn: 每人在免税额度内，请开箱检查。
turns.en: Within the duty-free limit per person. Please open the bag.

turns.cn: 还有一台旧笔记本电脑，个人用。
turns.en: There's also an old laptop for personal use.

turns.cn: 个人用品没问题，酒也放行。
turns.en: Personal items are fine. The wine is okay too.
Do I owe any duty?
No. Please take the green channel.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 5/8: Agriculture Check
scene: 海关警犬区域，官员问你包里有没有食物。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 包里有水果、种子或肉类吗？
turns.en: Any fruit, seeds, or meat in your bags?

turns.cn: 没有，飞机上吃剩的饼干扔了。
turns.en: No. I threw away leftover cookies from the flight.
Please place your bag on the belt.
Okay.
You're clear. You may go.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 6/8: Currency Exchange
scene: 出关后你在机场换一点美元零钱。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 能换一百美元小面额吗？
turns.en: Can I exchange for a hundred dollars in small bills?

turns.cn: 可以，汇率在这，手续费五块。
turns.en: Yes. Rate's posted here. Five-dollar fee.

turns.cn: 刷卡行吗？我只有大额钞票。
turns.en: Can I use a card? I only have large notes.
Card is fine.
Thank you.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 7/8: Ground Transport
scene: 你在机场问讯处咨询去市区交通。（对话链：入境）

turns.cn: 去曼哈顿中城，地铁还是机场大巴？
turns.en: To Midtown Manhattan, subway or airport bus?

turns.cn: 大巴十八块，地铁便宜但要换乘。
turns.en: Bus is eighteen. Subway is cheaper but you transfer.
Where do I catch the bus?
Right out the door, gate four.
How long does it take?
About forty-five minutes without traffic.

chain.title: Entering the Country at the Airport

title: Chain 8/8: Hotel Check-in
scene: 傍晚你到达预订的酒店办理入住。（对话链：入境）

turns.en: Welcome! Do you have a reservation?
Yes. Zhang Wei, two nights.

turns.cn: 请出示护照，需要信用卡担保。
turns.en: Passport, please. We'll need a card for incidentals.

turns.cn: 在这。行李能帮忙送房间吗？
turns.en: Here you go. Can someone bring up my luggage?

turns.cn: 当然，行李员马上来。祝您住得愉快！
turns.en: Of course. A bellhop will be right up. Enjoy your stay!
Thank you. Finally made it.
